reviews.comment:
Finde con turismo, el sábado x 40 minutos no atendieron porque estaban descargando 2 camiones nafta siendo mediodía. Otro horario no tenían? Y el domingo solo vendían infinia, súper no tenían. Mentira con el precio que tienen, un 10 % más que en el centro no venden infinia y mienten que súper no tienen y se sacan la infinia de encima. Repito súper $2200 y en el centro $2000. A veces solo reciben efectivo, a veces solo efectivo y tarjeta no transferencia. Y esto no sería malo si uno puede elegir otra marca y estación de servicio, Pero ellos lo saben y x eso hacen lo que quieren. Querés elegir otra estación te vas 70 kms a Jachal o 170 a San Juan centro. Y cdo vas a Chile es la última opción. Entonces mi consejo: no ayudes a estos especuladores, carga en Jachal o San Juan Capital y te salvas que te asalten con precios y malos servicios. Y broche de oro, solo atiende de 7 a 21 hs, ni horario completo. Sin dudas cdo no hay competencia hacen lo q quieren
Así corren el turismo y abusan de la gente del lugar

(Translated by Google)
Weekend with tourists, on Saturday they were closed for 40 minutes because they were unloading two trucks of gasoline at midday. Didn't they have any other hours? And on Sunday they only sold Infinia, they didn't have Super. It's a lie with the prices they charge, 10% more than downtown. They don't sell Infinia and they lie about not having Super to get rid of it. I repeat, Super is $2200 and downtown it's $2000. Sometimes they only accept cash, sometimes only cash and card, no transfers. And this wouldn't be so bad if you could choose another brand and gas station, but they know it and that's why they do whatever they want. If you want to choose another station, you have to go 70 km to Jachal or 170 km to downtown San Juan. And when you go to Chile, it's the last option. So my advice: don't help these profiteers, fill up in Jachal or San Juan Capital and you'll avoid being ripped off with prices and bad service. And to top it all off, they're only open from 7 am to 9 pm, not even full hours. Without a doubt, when there's no competition they do whatever they want. That's how they ruin tourism and take advantage of the local people.

reviews.comment:
Había 3 personas atendiendo, 2 fueron muy amables, pero Ariel muy mala atención. Pusimos 4 motos en la misma dirección q estaba el auto anterior, pero a nosotros nos hizo dar vuelta todas las motos de forma muy antipática o dijo que no nos cargaba

(Translated by Google)
There were three people working; two were very friendly, but Ariel provided terrible service. We lined up four motorcycles in the same direction as the previous car, but he rudely made us turn all the motorcycles around or told us he wouldn't charge us.
